name: Marincess Mandarin
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>海晶乙女</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>マリンセス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>マンダリン
desc: If you control 2 or more "Marincess" monsters, while this card is in your hand or GY: You can target 1 WATER Link Monster you control; Special Summon this card to your zone that monster points to, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "Marincess Mandarin" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If you control 2 or more "Marincess" monsters, while this card is in your hand or GY: You can target 1 WATER Link Monster you control; Special Summon this card to your zone that monster points to, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "Marincess Mandarin" once per turn.
eff: If you control 2 or more "Marincess" monsters, while this card is in your hand or GY: You can target 1 WATER Link Monster you control; Special Summon this card to your zone that monster points to, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "Marincess Mandarin" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
